typography.hierarchy_rules: Use tracking-tight for headings (H1/H2). Keep H1 max text-5xl md:text-6xl. Use uppercase with wide tracking (tracking-[0.2em]) for overlines and small labels. Do not use fashion serif fonts.

colors.rules: Avoid pure black #000000 without texture. Prioritize deep obsidian and graphite. Accent colors (gold/amber) are used sparingly for CTAs, icons, and highlights to signal luxury. No childish colors.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, or p-12 for internal card paddings where possible. Section spacing should be py-24 or py-32.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento grids for services. Asymmetric layouts for 'Why Choose Us'. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 for dense information.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-none to rounded-md max) to maintain a mechanical, precision-focused feel.

header.style: Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) with 1px bottom border (border-white/10). Sticky positioning z-50.
header.logo: Text-based wordmark. Font: Sora, bold, uppercase. 'JMA' in white/silver, 'MOTOR SERVICE' smaller with gold/amber accent. No cartoon icons.

hero.style: Cinematic. Image overlay max bg-black/50. Animated headlights/reflections via CSS/Framer Motion. Parallax scroll effect.
hero.badges: Google rating (5.0, 8 reviews) card floating over the image or positioned carefully with glassmorphism.
hero.text: Reliable Car Repair & Maintenance in Dublin City Centre
hero.subtext: Professional diagnostics, servicing, repairs and general vehicle maintenance for local drivers in Dublin.

cards.style: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no heavy box-shadows. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), border color brightens to white/20 or gold/50.

buttons.primary: Solid gold/amber background with black text. Sharp edges. Hover: lighter amber.
buttons.secondary: Transparent with 1px border. White text. Hover: bg-white/10.
buttons.whatsapp: Use standard WhatsApp green (#25D366) or a premium dark variant with green icon for consistency with the dark theme.

motion.philosophy: Smooth, deliberate, and cinematic. No bouncy or playful animations.
motion.hero_animations: Subtle scale up on background, slow fade-in for text, shimmering effect on the car's headlights using CSS masks or gradients. Add soft smoke/atmosphere if possible.
motion.scroll: Fade-up for elements entering viewport (Framer Motion). Parallax effect on hero.

hero_background.description: Sleek sports car with illuminated headlights in dark setting. Ideal for cinematic hero. Add CSS overlay to make it moody.

services_texture.description: Dark sedan parked in a concrete garage. Use as a subdued background for the services section.

garage_context.description: Dimly lit industrial garage filled with tools. Great for the 'Why Choose Us' section.

engine_detail.description: Detailed close-up of a vintage car engine showing metallic components. Useful for specific service cards or textures.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient contrast. Use text-shadow or gradient overlays.
accessibility.motion: MUST respect prefers-reduced-motion media query. Disable heavy parallax and headlight animations for users requesting reduced motion.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='service-card').

content_requirements.reviews: Strictly use '5.0 on Google based on 8 reviews'. Do NOT invent fake customer names. Use a professional aggregate rating card.

contact.address: Brunswick Pl, City centre, Dublin, D02 VK57
